name: Light and Easy Picante Fish (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: 1 medium green and/or red bell pepper, seeded and cut into 1 inch pieces (3/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart microwave-safe casserole, combine mushrooms, pepper, onion, and broth. Cook, covered, on 100% power (high) for 5-6 minutes, stirring once until tender.
2. Place fish fillets in an even layer in an 8 x 8 x 2 inch microwave-safe baking dish, tucking under thin parts. Cook, covered, on high for 4-5 minutes or until fish just flakes with a fork. Drain juices.
3. With a slotted spoon, place vegetables on top of fish; sprinkle with oregano.
4. Spoon salsa over vegetables. Cook, uncovered, for 1-2 minutes or until heated through. Sprinkle with parmesan.
